title: Workforms "multi-select" addition to column to text based list
excerpt:
Use Case: The workform is used to collect information about creative projects that include numerous file dimensions. 
At the moment the items come into monday.com as a column that is rather difficult to see all at once. …

posts.author: emochel (Emily Mochel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Use Case: The workform is used to collect information about creative projects that include numerous file dimensions.

At the moment the items come into monday.com as a column that is rather difficult to see all at once. Is there an automation or a function to turn the multi-select items into just a list view that is easier to read?

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @emochel - not sure what you mean by this one?
Can you explain how you would imagine the output to be?
